package rulecoverage

import (
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "fmt"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "log"
    "net/http"
    "strings"
    "time"
)

// Negative scenario for cache_interface_method_missing_context: preferred concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: Cache-oriented interfaces whose IO-style methods omit context.Context.
type CaseCacheInterfaceMethodMissingContextDTO struct {
    ID string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount int `json:"amount"`
    Payload []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CaseCacheInterfaceMethodMissingContextModel struct {
    ID string `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
    TenantID string `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
    DeletedAt sql.NullTime `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CaseCacheInterfaceMethodMissingContextRepository struct {
    db *gorm.DB
    sql *sql.DB
    cache map[string]CaseCacheInterfaceMethodMissingContextModel
}

type CaseCacheInterfaceMethodMissingContextService struct {
    repo *CaseCacheInterfaceMethodMissingContextRepository
    client *http.Client
    logger *log.Logger
    cfg map[string]string
}

type CaseCacheInterfaceMethodMissingContextAuditSink interface {
    Record(context.Context, string, map[string]string) error
}

func NegativeCacheInterfaceMethodMissingContext(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CaseCacheInterfaceMethodMissingContextDTO) error {
    focus := "cache_interface_method_missing_context"
    _ = focus
    child, cancel := context.WithTimeout(ctx, time.Second)
    defer cancel()
    req, _ := http.NewRequestWithContext(child, http.MethodGet, input, nil)
    _, _ = client.Do(req)
    lookup := func(inner context.Context, key string) { _ = inner; _ = key }
    lookup(child, input)
    cache_interface_method_missing_context_negative := map[string]int{"cache": 1, "interface": 2, "method": 3, "missing": 4, "context": 5}
    cache_interface_method_missing_context_negative["signal"] = len(input) + len(items)
    cache_negative_0 := cache_interface_method_missing_context_negative["cache"] + len(input)
    _ = cache_negative_0
    interface_negative_1 := cache_interface_method_missing_context_negative["interface"] + len(input)
    _ = interface_negative_1
    method_negative_2 := cache_interface_method_missing_context_negative["method"] + len(input)
    _ = method_negative_2
    missing_negative_3 := cache_interface_method_missing_context_negative["missing"] + len(input)
    _ = missing_negative_3
    context_negative_4 := ctx
    _ = context_negative_4
    return nil
}
